vibe: Editorial Future, Precise, Technical, High-End SaaS

scale.h1: text-5xl md:text-6xl lg:text-7xl font-semibold tracking-tighter leading-none

navigation.wrapper: fixed top-0 left-0 right-0 z-50 bg-black/60 backdrop-blur-xl border-b border-white/5
navigation.layout: flex items-center justify-between h-20 max-w-7xl mx-auto px-6 md:px-12
navigation.cta: px-6 py-2.5 bg-white text-black font-medium rounded-full hover:bg-zinc-200 transition-colors text-sm

hero.wrapper: relative pt-40 pb-20 md:pt-48 md:pb-32 overflow-hidden flex flex-col items-center text-center
hero.background: absolute inset-0 z-0 bg-[radial-gradient(ellipse_at_top,_var(--tw-gradient-stops))] from-indigo-900/20 via-black to-black
hero.badge: inline-flex items-center px-3 py-1 rounded-full border border-indigo-500/30 bg-indigo-500/10 text-indigo-300 text-xs font-medium tracking-wide mb-8 z-10
hero.headline: text-5xl md:text-7xl font-heading font-semibold tracking-tighter text-white mb-6 z-10 max-w-4xl
hero.subheadline: text-lg md:text-xl text-zinc-400 max-w-2xl mb-10 z-10

how_it_works.card: group relative p-8 rounded-3xl bg-[#0A0A0A] border border-white/5 hover:border-indigo-500/30 transition-all duration-500 overflow-hidden
how_it_works.icon_wrapper: w-14 h-14 rounded-2xl bg-indigo-500/10 border border-indigo-500/20 flex items-center justify-center text-indigo-400 mb-6 group-hover:scale-110 group-hover:bg-indigo-500/20 transition-all duration-500
how_it_works.title: text-xl font-heading font-medium text-white mb-3

generator_form.label: text-sm font-medium text-zinc-300 flex items-center justify-between
generator_form.textarea: w-full min-h-[320px] p-6 bg-[#0A0A0A] border border-white/10 rounded-2xl text-zinc-300 font-mono text-sm leading-relaxed focus:outline-none focus:border-indigo-500 focus:ring-1 focus:ring-indigo-500 transition-all resize-y placeholder:text-zinc-700
generator_form.submit_button: relative px-10 py-5 bg-indigo-600 hover:bg-indigo-500 text-white font-medium text-lg rounded-full shadow-[0_0_40px_rgba(79,70,229,0.3)] hover:shadow-[0_0_60px_rgba(79,70,229,0.5)] transition-all hover:-translate-y-1 flex items-center gap-3 disabled:opacity-50 disabled:cursor-not-allowed
generator_form.status_stream: mt-6 text-sm font-mono text-indigo-400 flex items-center gap-2 h-6

result_card.wrapper: mt-12 w-full max-w-2xl mx-auto p-8 md:p-12 bg-[#0F0F11] border border-indigo-500/20 rounded-3xl relative overflow-hidden flex flex-col items-center text-center
result_card.success_icon: w-16 h-16 rounded-full bg-emerald-500/10 text-emerald-400 flex items-center justify-center mb-6
result_card.title: text-2xl font-heading font-medium text-white mb-2
result_card.button_group: flex flex-col sm:flex-row gap-4 w-full justify-center
result_card.download_btn: px-8 py-4 bg-white text-black font-medium rounded-full hover:bg-zinc-200 transition-colors flex items-center justify-center gap-2
result_card.overleaf_btn: px-8 py-4 bg-transparent border border-white/20 text-white font-medium rounded-full hover:bg-white/5 transition-colors flex items-center justify-center gap-2

error_card.wrapper: mt-12 w-full max-w-lg mx-auto p-6 bg-red-500/10 border border-red-500/20 rounded-2xl flex flex-col items-center text-center
error_card.title: text-red-400 font-medium mb-2
error_card.button: mt-4 px-6 py-2 bg-red-500/20 hover:bg-red-500/30 text-red-300 rounded-full text-sm font-medium transition-colors

footer.wrapper: py-12 border-t border-white/5 mt-20 flex items-center justify-center

motion_and_interactions.hover_states: All buttons must scale by 0.98 on tap. Card borders shift to subtle indigo on hover. Textareas focus must have a sharp 1px ring.
motion_and_interactions.page_load: Staggered fade-up for Hero elements (Badge -> H1 -> Subhead -> Button) using Framer Motion (y: 20, opacity: 0 -> y: 0, opacity: 1, duration: 0.8, ease: [0.16, 1, 0.3, 1]).
motion_and_interactions.form_submission: Button text swaps to 'Processing...' with a spinning Lucide icon. The terminal text below the button types out updates sequentially.
motion_and_interactions.result_entrance: Scale up from 0.95 and fade in (duration: 0.6).

media.notes: No external raster images used. The design relies purely on CSS gradients, mesh backgrounds, glassmorphism, and Phosphor/Lucide icons for a cleaner, high-performance SaaS look.

instructions_to_main_agent: Configure Tailwind with the specified colors (especially the custom background '#050505' and accent '#4F46E5') and fonts (Geist and Clash Display).
In tailwind.config.js, set fontFamily: { heading: ['Clash Display', 'sans-serif'], sans: ['Geist', 'sans-serif'], mono: ['Geist Mono', 'monospace'] }.
Ensure the hero section uses the specified radial-gradient and mask-image grid for the background to achieve the 'subtle animated gradient/grid' effect.
For the two textareas, use pure HTML/Tailwind classes as defined. Do NOT use Shadcn's Card wrapper for the main form inputs to maintain raw control over the min-height (320px) and font-mono styling.
Implement the streaming status updates directly below the submit button as a monospaced text element.

All interactive elements MUST use data-testid attributes (e.g., data-testid='job-description-input', data-testid='resume-input', data-testid='generate-button', data-testid='download-pdf-button', data-testid='overleaf-link').
The Result Card must only render upon successful generation.
Make sure the UI is strictly dark-mode only.
